channel.title: Autopapers: Daily AI Deep Dive
channel.description: Automated daily deep dives into the latest AI papers.
channel.ns0:author: Autopapers AI

item.title: Deep Dive: Attention Is All You Need
item.description:
**1) Main Contribution and Novelty** The paper introduces the "Transformer," a groundbreaking sequence transduction architecture that completely discards recurrent (RNN) and convolutional (CNN) layers. Its core novelty is relying exclusively on self-attention mechanisms to model global dependencies between inputs and outputs. This approach entirely eliminates the sequential computation bottleneck inherent in previous state-of-the-art sequence models.
**2) Key Methodology** The Transformer utilizes a stacked encoder-decoder architecture built entirely on Multi-Head Attention and position-wise feed-forward networks. It employs Scaled Dot-Product Attention, which scales dot products by the inverse square root of the key dimension to prevent vanishing gradients. Because the model lacks recurrence, it injects sinusoidal "Positional Encodings" into the input embeddings to provide the model with relative and absolute sequence order. This attention-only design reduces the maximum path length
